title: Preview of tickets in slack
excerpt:
Hi, 
When I paste a link to any ticket into slack, the preview always says “monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done”. 
Is there an option to change it into a real preview of the ticket?

posts.author: yanivy (Yaniv Yakubovich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
When I paste a link to any ticket into slack, the preview always says “monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done”.
Is there an option to change it into a real preview of the ticket?

posts.author: DaR (David Rieger)
posts.cookedHtml: Could we get an update on this? I think all that needs to be done is a change in the HTML meta tags on Monday. It’d make a big difference to us.

posts.author: j15r (Joel Webber)
posts.cookedHtml: Any movement on this? I’m trying to convince my team to use Monday more frequently, but they’re more comfortable just posting things in Slack, which gets really messy. Any opportunity I have to push people towards Monday for more structured, persistent items (work items, shared files, etc) is helpful. But the broken link snippets are undermining my case.

posts.author: twinkletoes (Twinkle)
posts.cookedHtml: Someone else posted something very similar and it has a ‘vote’ option so I suggest you vote for it. Display item info in link previews
